title: QT Funded 50% (MARCH MADNESS)
description: QT Funded, based in South Africa and established in October 2023, is a CFD firm offering two program types: 2 Steps and Instant. The firm supports the MT5, cTrader and TradeLocker trading platforms and offers its 2 Steps and Instant programs on those platforms. QT Funded has an Excellent review score of 4.4 out of 5 based on over 12,000 reviews. Verified by our [Intelligence Hub](/) for prop trading excellence.
forbidden_strategies: Excessive Exposure: Risking more than 75% of daily/max drawdown limits.
Max Risk Rule (Instant): 2% max risk allowed.
Max Risk Rule (Funded Prime): 2.5% max risk allowed.
Max Risk Rule (Funded Ultra): 1.5% max risk allowed.

payout_policy.minimum_payout: QT Instant, Prime & Power: 1% or $100 whichever is higher | QT Ultra: 2% of the account size.
payout_policy.processing_time: Every 14 days (Prime/Instant/Ultra subsequent). QT Power: On demand.
payout_policy.details: QT Instant: 80% split every 14 days (5% min profit, 25% consistency). QT Prime: Bi-weekly 80% split (90% w/ add-on). QT Power: On demand w/ 80% split (35% consistency). QT Ultra: 80% split, 21 day first cycle then 14 days.

firm_rules.copy_trading: Allowed between accounts personally owned by them. Copy trading or using the same strategy across accounts is NOT allowed if total allocation is $400,000 or above.
firm_rules.expert_advisor: Pre-Approval for EA: Only Risk Management EAs are allowed which must go through a pre-approval process. Fully automated or self-trading EAs & bots are strictly prohibited unless approved.
firm_rules.inactivity_rule: If no trading activity occurs for 30 consecutive days, the account will be breached and deleted.
firm_rules.news_trading: Evaluation: Allowed. Funded (Prime & Instant & Ultra): Restrictions of 5 minutes before or after high Impact News. QT PRIME ON-DEMAND DOES NOT have the news rule applied.
firm_rules.weekend_holding: Allowed (not explicitly prohibited except for potentially specific programs, checking... 'ThinkCapital Dual Step Intraday prohibited
forbidden_strategies: Excessive Exposure: Risking more than 75% of daily/max drawdown limits.
Max Risk Rule (Instant): 2% max risk allowed.
Max Risk Rule (Funded Prime): 2.5% max risk allowed.
Max Risk Rule (Funded Ultra): 1.5% max risk allowed.

seo_content:
QT Funded Technical Infrastructure

QT Funded, based in South Africa and established in October 2023, is a CFD proprietary trading firm (operating under the Quant Tekel brand) offering QT Instant (no evaluation), Prime Evaluation (2-step), Power Evaluation (2-step), and Ultra Evaluation (2-step) programs. Account sizes range from $1,250 to $100,000. Three platforms are supported: MT5, cTrader, and TradeLocker. A coupon code (QT50) delivers 50% off plus one free account (March Madness promotion). The firm holds an Excellent review score of 4.4 out of 5 based on over 12,000 reviews. Trading quote service was resumed in May 2025.

The QT Instant program covers four sizes: $1,250 at $14.30 (original $26.00), $10,000 at $72.60 (original $132.00), $25,000 at $137.50 (original $250.00), and $100,000 at $594.00 (original $1,080.00). The Prime Evaluation 2-step is listed at $5,000 for $33.00 (original $60.00) and $25,000 for $126.50 (original $230.00). The Ultra Evaluation 2-step spans three sizes: $10,000 at $72.25 (original $85.00), $50,000 at $242.25 (original $285.00), and $100,000 at $446.25 (original $525.00). The Power Evaluation 2-step is available at $25,000 for $48.00 (original $120.00). Payments are accepted via Apple Pay, Credit/Debit Card, Crypto, Google Pay, PayPal, and UPI Payment.

Three platforms are supported: MT5, cTrader, and TradeLocker. Tradable instruments include FX, Metals, Indices, Crypto, and Other Commodities. On Instant accounts, leverage is 1:50 for FX, 1:15 for Metals, 1:20 for Indices, and 1:1 for Crypto. On 2-step accounts, leverage is 1:100 for FX, 1:35 for Metals and Indices. News trading during evaluations is permitted with no restriction. On funded Prime, Instant, and Ultra accounts, a 5-minute news restriction applies before and after high-impact events; QT Prime On-Demand accounts are exempt from the news rule. Weekend holding is generally permitted.

The profit split is 80% across all programs, with a 90% upgrade available via add-on on Prime. QT Instant and Prime payout cycles are every 14 days. QT Ultra has a 21-day first payout cycle, then 14 days thereafter. QT Power is on demand. Minimum payout for Instant, Prime, and Power accounts is 1% of account size or $100, whichever is higher. Ultra accounts require a minimum of 2% of account size. QT Instant requires 5% minimum profit and 25% consistency for payouts. QT Power requires 35% consistency. Payout method is Crypto only.

QT Funded prohibits latency trading, arbitrage, HFT (including tick scalping, reverse trading, group hedging, and order book spamming), excessive one-sided positions, all-or-nothing approaches, account management services, and group trading. Exposing more than 75% of the daily or maximum drawdown limit in open positions is banned. Maximum risk per trade is 2% on Instant accounts, 2.5% on funded Prime accounts, and 1.5% on funded Ultra accounts. Copy trading between the trader's personally owned accounts is allowed; accounts sharing the same strategy may not collectively hold $400,000 or more in total allocation. Risk management EAs must go through a pre-approval process; fully automated or self-trading EAs and bots are prohibited unless pre-approved. Accounts are terminated after 30 consecutive days of inactivity.
